charter: Design and implementation of the session-backup-hydration feature: the archives machine-config concept, mfz sessions backup (S3 upload with freshness guard and bucket-hardening preflight), and hydration of vanished sessions from archive during thread refresh/ingest, including the adversarial-review hardening pass (atomic staging, negative caching, profile-pinned read skip, data-home centralization).

sessions.title: Add S3 backup for thread session data
Session-backup-hydration: recovery, bucket hardening, adversarial review pass, and discovery-skill fix
